headline: A Look At EMCOR Group’s Valuation As Analyst Optimism Builds Around Data Center And High Tech Infrastructure Growth
summary: Renewed analyst attention on EMCOR Group (EME), sparked by fresh Outperform ratings and raised expectations around its infrastructure services work in data centers and high tech manufacturing, has pushed the stock back onto many investors’ watchlists. See our latest analysis for EMCOR Group. Even after the share price fell 3.31% in the latest session and is down 11.31% on a 1 month share price return basis, EMCOR’s 90 day share price return of 13.66% and very large 5 year total shareholder...
